title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA full（第11部分）
content:
Payments (for Other Research As part of a total compensation package, provided such payments are reasonable Staff, excluding and are made according to a formal policy of the University that is consistently PI’s) applied regardless of the source of funds. Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval.

Overtime Not allowable Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 1 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Type of Expenses Description Annual Leave Allowable For full-time employees. The no. of days of leave accorded to staff must be in accordance with formal policies of the University that is consistently applied regardless of the source of funds. For employees who spend less than 100% of their time on the project, their annual leave should be pro-rated/allocated accordingly Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval. Staff Recruitment Not allowable and Related Costs Examples of such expenses are advertising and recruitment agency costs, staff relocation and settling-in allowances. Exception: employment pass application is allowable but dependent pass is not. Staff Insurance Not allowable Visiting Professors Allowable / Researchers to SUTD For honorarium (this includes meals, transportation and / or any other miscellaneous expenses incurred) and travel-related expenses (ie. airfare and accommodation). The Visiting Professor / Researcher must be identified and his / her contribution to the research activities that the TL Research Grant intended to support must be clearly defined and described for the approval of such reimbursements. PIs should adhere to HR’s visitor policy at all times. Budget for Visiting Professors and Researchers to SUTD must be taken from Visits and Events vote. TL Visiting form must be completed and submitted for approval. Subject to TL director’s approval. As far as possible, the Visiting Professors should be housed on campus accommodation and are encouraged to give a talk to the SUTD community to showcase their work. Please refer to the University’s policy on Visiting Professors in SUTD Central under Human of Resources (HR). Conference and Travel Related Expenses Funding Limit Capped at S$8,000 per year, per track. Regardless of overseas or local usage. Prior approval from TL Director is required. Overseas Allowable Conferences For PIs and his / her research staff hired under the grant and matriculated SUTD students, if the overseas conference is directly relevant to the research that the grant intended to support and contributes to meeting the deliverables. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 2 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: October 2017 Type of Expenses Description Support for overseas collaborators, visiting researchers and visiting students are NOT allowed. Visa application is claimable, if it is required to fulfil the travel. Travel insurance for matriculated SUTD students is claimable. PIs and / or his / her research staff hired under the grant are required to submit the completed travel request form to TL office at least 4 weeks prior to the actual travel date. TL Travel Request Approval PIs can approve their research staff’s travel requests up to S$5,000.
